title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Finolex Cables - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Finolex Cables - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Finolex Cables are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Finolex Cables:
Finolex Cables is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Cables!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
